social.description: Configuration for the in-tree feishu-social extension (group context injection, sender awareness, anti-spam). Migrated from the retired feishu-bot-social plugin.

contextGroups.description: List of oc_* chat IDs where group context is injected.

contextMessageCount.description: How many recent messages to fetch per group context build (5-100).

contextCacheTtlMs.description: TTL for the per-chat context cache, in ms. Default 60000.

stormThreshold.description: Bot-inbound count within 30s window that trips storm debounce.

circuitBreakerMaxOutbound.description: Outbound count within 60s window that opens the circuit.

circuitBreakerSilenceMs.description: How long the circuit stays open once tripped.

alertReceiverOpenId.description: Admin open_id; storm-detection DM is sent to this user. Skip DM if unset.

botOverrides.description: User-supplied bot metadata overrides keyed by agentId.

debugLog.description: Enable verbose social-extension log file under ~/.openclaw/feishu-social/logs/.

wikiBotsPath.description: Path to the user-supplied wiki-bots.json. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/feishu-social/wiki-bots.json.
